subject: [COMMON][ETCD] Skip startup self-discovery for etcd nodes
commit_message:
[COMMON][ETCD] Skip startup self-discovery for etcd nodes

Current startup script of etcd checks whether all assumed other nodes
are already running, before proceeding. This check, however, also
includes checking localhost, but due to using headless service
statefulset pod DNS discovery, it doesnt succeed immediately.
In some deployments k8s DNS server may be laggy, thus failing startup
script to finish before liveness check. This patch fixes such failures
of 1 pod etcd clusters, and improves startup time for any size ones.

Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-2668
Change-Id: I2f9263a0f4964b0a495631775d0cbbceef25e85b

@Sylvain, @Krzysztof - is Gating CI using some custom, minimized ONAP deployment now? Reading patchset 1 gating results (https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//117094-1/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/kubernetes-status/index.html) I can't find a single etcd pod/sts, but they for sure should be there.. do you know what could cause it? I believe it's not my change 😉

I believe it's not my change 😉

ok, didn't notice helm deployment of multicloud failed in-between so that might be source of the issue. Don't mind that, hopefully won't reappear in next run :)
